Lifeism 1.0 is the digital implementation of [[Lifeism]] before it develops physical practices. It is the norm as of [[2024]] and is planned to continue being the norm throughout the [[2020s]] until it gets superseded by irl [[Lifeism 2.0]].

== Potential implementation research material ==
[[Right in the Feels]] is a program by [[Alok Kanojia]] which Immaunelle investigated as a good model<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FMeNI3a7yZ4&pp=wgIGCgQQAhgB</ref>. It turned out not to be a good model at all.

The HealthyGamerGG ban made things quite questionable.[[Category:Evolutionist Online Infrastructure]]
[[sn:Lifeism 1.0]]== Infrastructure ==
Current infrastructure is as follows

* [[evolution.faith]]
* [[Lifeism Wiki]]
* [[Lifeism discord server]]
* [[Immanuelle's Youtube Channel]]
* [[Immanuelle's Tiktok]]
* [[r/Lifeism]]
* [[Immanuelle’s Twitter]]

== Challenges ==
Easily communicated language is probably the biggest challenge faced by Lifeism 1.0

== Localization ==
Localization is not a concern until the English language Lifeism is perfected

== Livestreams ==
Livestreams are a big element of Lifeism 1.0 in modern usage

== References ==
[[Category:History]]
[[sn:Lifeism 1.0]][[Category:Lifeism 1.0]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
